description_long: This is a compact, rectangular couch with a green checkered upholstery, featuring a continuous backrest and seat cushion. The couch has a wooden frame with visible block-style legs and armrests, all finished in a dark, weathered wood texture. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the structure, with no visible separation or accent pillows. The upholstery pattern is a bold, large-scale check in varying shades of green, giving it a rustic, vintage appearance. The armrests are straight and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a boxy silhouette. The overall design is sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor communal spaces.
description: A boxy green checkered couch with integrated cushions and a dark wooden frame, featuring straight armrests and block legs. The design is compact and rustic, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full backrest with green checkered upholstery and the wooden frame's back legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the block-style wooden legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the continuous seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest, seat depth, and the wooden frame's construction.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One continuous seat cushion and one continuous back cushion, both integrated and attached to the frame, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Large-scale green checkered pattern with a woven texture, no visible tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, block-style wooden legs with a dark, weathered finish; short and sturdy, extending from the frame corners.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, constructed from the same dark wood as the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and attached backrest with integrated cushioning, matching the seat in green checkered upholstery.
